## Summary

<!-- Brief description of the change -->

## Type

- [ ] Erratum (typo, incorrect equation, factual error)
- [ ] Clarification (rewording for clarity, no semantic change)
- [ ] Extension (new theorem, proof, or section)
- [ ] Citation (adding or correcting references)
- [ ] Other

## Paper(s) affected

- [ ] Beyond Retrieval (LeAP/CITE)
- [ ] From Memory to Epistemics

## Checklist

- [ ] LaTeX compiles without errors
- [ ] Bibliography entries are complete
- [ ] Changes are self-contained (don't break other sections)
- [ ] For extensions: proof is complete or clearly marked as sketch
